title: Grassley Presses Bessent on 45Z Regulations
content:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on June 12 committed to implementing upcoming changes to the 45Z clean fuel production credit â€œin the most robust wayâ€ and ensuring foreign actors do not have a backdoor into the program. 
Bessent briefly commented on Treasuryâ€™s plans for 45Z implementation during a Senate Finance Committee hearing focused on the presidentâ€™s fiscal year 2026 budget for the Department of Treasury and tax reform. Watch the full hearing here: https://www.finance.senate.gov/hearings/the-presidents-fiscal-year-2026-budget-for-the-department-of-treasury-and-tax-reform.
